calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Aug-12-2004 Vacated

MANDATORY SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Aug-11-2004 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCES; PLTF VIJAY PATEL IN PRO PER, DEFT CHARLES LOGAN IN PRO PER

SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE HELD. THE CAUSE IS SETTLED AND THE TERMS OF THE SETTLEMENT ARE PUT ON THE RECORD:
PLAINTIFF IS TO PAY $1,500 TO DEFT BY AUGUST 13, 2004. IF THE PAYMENT IS NOT MADE, THE TRIAL DATE REMAINS. IF THE PAYMENT IS MADE, PLAINTIFF IS TO CALL DEPT. 206 TO VACATE THE TRIAL DATE AND DISMISS THE CASE WITH PREJUDICE. DEFENDANT IS TO VACATE THE PREMISES AT 175 6TH ST. #509, SF., CA 94103 BY 5 PM, AUGUST 25, 2004. IF DEFENDANT DOESN'T VACATE IT, PLAINTIFF WITH 24 HOUR NOTICE REQUEST TO ENTER JUDGMENT. BOTH PARTIES WAIVE ANY CLAIMS. PLAINTIFF WAIVES RENT AND DAMAGES. PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT PERSONALLY AGREE TO THE TERMS.

JUDGE PRO TEM TIELA CHALMERS,REPORTER ANN MENDOZA,CLERK T.MARUYAMA (218)

DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Aug-09-2004 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES:
RULING:
NO APPEARANCES ON THIS MATTER. THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING: DEFENDANT CHARLES LOGAN'S DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT: OFF CALENDAR; First Amended Complaint filed 07/16/04. (301/JLW/) Reporter: Christina Paxton, CSR #1558
